done_rule: A workstream is done only when status=green and repo_sha, nas_run_id, main_smoke, pages_dev_smoke, and artifact_proof are set.

workstreams.title: Keep dirty Market and generated runtime artifacts out of unrelated commits
workstreams.artifact_proof: npm run ops:dirty-scope ok; blocked_total=0; only unstaged Market/generated runtime files remain scoped
workstreams.notes: npm run ops:dirty-scope ok; blocked_total=0; only unstaged Market/generated runtime files remain scoped

workstreams.title: Expose complete post-deploy proof publicly on both hosts
Track every master-plan item through repo, NAS, MAIN, pages.dev evidence
workstreams.artifact_proof: npm run ops:workstream-tracker ok; tracker updated with NAS/MAIN evidence
workstreams.notes: npm run ops:workstream-tracker ok; tracker updated with NAS/MAIN evidence

workstreams.title: Make Stock UI integrity audit a real hard gate when enabled
workstreams.artifact_proof: scripts/nas/nas-env.sh defaults RV_STOCK_UI_AUDIT_HARD_GATE=1; NAS stock_ui_integrity_audit command_exit_code=0 in run 20260506T143357Z
workstreams.notes: scripts/nas/nas-env.sh defaults RV_STOCK_UI_AUDIT_HARD_GATE=1; NAS stock_ui_integrity_audit command_exit_code=0 in run 20260506T143357Z

workstreams.title: Generalize stale crash seal and stale lock policy
workstreams.artifact_proof: Morning acceptance locks=0, rogue_processes=0; NAS lock audit integrated; stale crash policy code deployed
workstreams.notes: Morning acceptance locks=0, rogue_processes=0; NAS lock audit integrated; stale crash policy code deployed

workstreams.title: Add no-progress watchdog auto-escalation without creating a second pipeline owner
workstreams.notes: Watchdog emits typed alert artifact, uses progress/resource no-progress detection, and records alert-only recovery policy with no parallel recovery owner; NAS proof pending.

workstreams.title: Centralize per-step heap, RSS, and duration budgets
workstreams.artifact_proof: NAS result captured heap/RSS/duration for wrangler_deploy and stock_ui_integrity_audit in run 20260506T143357Z
workstreams.notes: NAS result captured heap/RSS/duration for wrangler_deploy and stock_ui_integrity_audit in run 20260506T143357Z

workstreams.title: Split hist_probs into daily bounded non-blocking and weekly full catchup
workstreams.notes: Weekly off-hours entrypoint with separate lock and Nightly window guard implemented; local tests passed; DSM scheduling/NAS run proof still needed.

workstreams.title: Track deploy bundle size, max file, top files, and growth
workstreams.artifact_proof: build-deploy-bundle strict manifest ok; runtime historical cache bundle 5,471 files, 516 MB, max file 15.02 MiB
workstreams.notes: build-deploy-bundle strict manifest ok; runtime historical cache bundle 5,471 files, 516 MB, max file 15.02 MiB

workstreams.title: Automate morning acceptance for target date, ratios, smokes, locks, alerts, proof
workstreams.artifact_proof: npm run ops:morning-acceptance ok; hosts=2 historical_probes=6 locks=0 rogue_processes=0
workstreams.notes: npm run ops:morning-acceptance ok; hosts=2 historical_probes=6 locks=0 rogue_processes=0

workstreams.title: Add market_data_refresh per-exchange checkpoint and resume
workstreams.notes: Bulk exchange checkpoint/resume implemented with completed exchange skip and checkpoint proof; NAS full run proof pending.

workstreams.title: Prove q1_delta_ingest is delta-only and reports touched assets, packs, rows
workstreams.notes: Q1 delta proof report added after ingest; exposes delta-only verdict plus touched packs/assets/rows; NAS proof pending.

workstreams.title: Make public history shards incremental with canaries and strict budgets
workstreams.notes: Changed-pack incremental rebuild with existing-shard merge, full fallback, canary report, and max shard budget implemented; NAS proof pending.

workstreams.title: Make page_core_bundle incremental with strict reason recheck and full fallback
workstreams.notes: Conservative same-target incremental reuse implemented; target/schema changes force full fallback and reused rows pass strict operational recheck; NAS proof pending.

workstreams.title: Add provider health preflight, bounded retry, failure types, daily cap guard
workstreams.notes: EODHD auth/live/cap typed preflight report added before market_data_refresh; existing refresh retry/cap remains in place; NAS run proof pending.

workstreams.title: Start SQLite shadow for raw and adjusted bars without primary cutover
workstreams.notes: Shadow-only SQLite builder with raw/adjusted tables, WAL, integrity_check, validation report implemented; local max-symbol test passed; NAS full shadow and reader benchmark pending.

workstreams.title: Complete Stock Analyzer UI semantics, layout, empty states, and tests
workstreams.main_smoke: https://rubikvault.com stock UI audit PASS pass_rate=100.00% operational_rate=99.85%; browser Z WAIT/LOW/no active R-R/no Coverage FULL
workstreams.pages_dev_smoke: https://rubikvault-site.pages.dev stock UI audit PASS pass_rate=100.00% operational_rate=99.85%
workstreams.notes: Central buildStockUiState remains the UI semantic source; horizons capped by signal confidence; Z browser smoke proves WAIT/LOW, pending setup without active R/R, no Coverage FULL, no rebound copy, no HIGH CONF contradiction.

workstreams.title: Enable DP8 Market as optional lane with typed data contracts and 5-tab UI
workstreams.main_smoke: https://rubikvault.com/market versioned market-hub assets; data_date=2026-05-06 cards=42; Compass 60/100; MARKET_HUB_AUDIT_PASS warnings=0
workstreams.pages_dev_smoke: https://rubikvault-site.pages.dev market hub audit pass; data_date=2026-05-06 cards=42 capital_rotation_ratios=20 warnings=0
workstreams.notes: DP8 market step ran on NAS, release-full deployed, strict market audits passed on both hosts, 5-tab UI live with versioned assets, global-latest fresh, capital-rotation ratios=20, legacy latest typed degraded/stale instead of false green.

workstreams.title: Make BUY signals fresh, confidence-scored, reasoned, and scorecard-backed
workstreams.main_smoke: https://rubikvault.com/data/snapshots/best-setups-v4.json source=decision_bundle_consumer rows=60 stale_rows=0 with_evidence=60; deploy-proof sha=2e6b7b21407acd5861504a4a9d1cf64af7cd2e3b smokes_ok=true
workstreams.pages_dev_smoke: https://rubikvault-site.pages.dev/data/snapshots/best-setups-v4.json source=decision_bundle_consumer rows=60 stale_rows=0 with_evidence=60; deploy-proof sha=2e6b7b21407acd5861504a4a9d1cf64af7cd2e3b smokes_ok=true
workstreams.artifact_proof: decision bundle snapshot dec-20260505-852ac8ab2c85; tmp/stock-ui-audit-custom-phase6-2e6b7b.json PASS; tmp/stock-ui-audit-pages-phase6-2e6b7b.json PASS; browser frontpage verified decision source with no old fallback headlines
workstreams.notes: Frontpage BUY rows now require verified decision bundle rows with MEDIUM/HIGH confidence, empty stale_flags, no blocking_reasons, eligible BUY status, decision reasons, module contributions, decision_as_of, and price_basis. NAS rebuilt decision bundle and best-setups snapshot, then release-full wrangler_deploy succeeded on both hosts.
